title: crambe juncea
intro: Crambe juncea, also known as sea kale or rocket, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its tall stems and edible leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crambe juncea include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Crambe juncea can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used as a food ingredient in its raw or cooked form.
